drift: statusColors.ts:18 wraps one value in hsl() while others use bare var() — inconsistent with Tailwind v4 color resolution
likelyCause: Manual edit predating Tailwind v4 cascade fix; hsl() wrapper incorrect for tokens that already resolve to full color values
fixDirection: Remove hsl() wrapper from the single inconsistent entry

drift: MenuPerformanceDashboard.tsx and RealTimeDashboard.tsx reference --chart-6 and --chart-7 which may not be defined in reception theme (only 1-5 defined)
likelyCause: Components ported from a theme with more chart colors; reception theme token set not updated
fixDirection: Define --chart-6 and --chart-7 in reception theme tokens, or cap chart color cycle at 5

drift: ManagerAuthModal, EodOverrideModal, DenominationInput, DOBSection use arbitrary sizing (w-[280px], h-[44px]) instead of 8-pt token scale
likelyCause: Components built before design system spacing conventions were established
fixDirection: Replace arbitrary values with nearest token-scale equivalents (w-72, h-11, max-w-sm)

drift: grayishShades family has fewer defined rows than other shade families, creating gaps when shade picker cycles uniformly
likelyCause: Shade families added incrementally; grayish not fully populated
fixDirection: Audit all 35 shade families for row count consistency and add missing rows

drift: TicketItems.tsx:23 hover and active states use identical background color — no visual distinction between hover and press
likelyCause: Copy-paste or incomplete interaction state design
fixDirection: Use hover:bg-surface-2 and active:bg-surface-3 for distinct interaction feedback
